feed.title: june’s blog
feed.subtitle: June's thoughts, ramblings and other musings.

entry.title: funemployment
entry.content:
hello again

A 5 year comeback! Hopefully I won’t wait another 5 until my next post. I’m currently taking some time off. I’ve mostly been wandering around San Francisco’s numerous public libraries, in search of solitude, a place to sit and very stable wifi.

know thyself

I’m trying to figure out what I want in my next role. So far, I’ve had the privllege to try out a product engineering role at Coinbase, and an infrastructure role at Retool. While I’ve learned a lot from both, I’ve realized that the things I’ve always loved the most in my job has been working with other people in a team. I love the feeling of working amongst people who have a shared purpose that drives them. I’m motivated the hit of dopamine when we meet milestones, and launch new functionality.

what’s next?

looking to start the job search soon. if you have a position that matches this description, I’d love to be in touch!
entry.summary: hello again A 5 year comeback! Hopefully I won’t wait another 5 until my next post. I’m currently taking some time off. I’ve mostly been wandering around San Francisco’s numerous public libraries, in search of solitude, a place to sit and very stable wifi.

entry.title: hello world
entry.content:
I couldn’t think of a cornier way to start this first post. This is what 2 braincells at 12:42 in the morning accomplishes. And yes, if you’re wondering, I am proud of myself.

To simply put it in illustrations, I feel like a cross between:

and

Besides, being delirious never hurt anyone.

The important thing today is that it marks a new era. The beginning of this blog. Or maybe the end of me as we know it. We’ll see. Stay tuned.
entry.summary: I couldn’t think of a cornier way to start this first post. This is what 2 braincells at 12:42 in the morning accomplishes. And yes, if you’re wondering, I am proud of myself.
